---
title: "localtime extension example"
format: html
---

The `localtime` shortcode displays a given date and time in the reader's local timezone.
The "Renders as" column below updates to your local time when the page loads.

## Examples

| Shortcode | Renders locally as |
|---|---|
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC >}} |
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 EST */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 EST >}} |
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 09:00 CET */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 09:00 CET >}} |
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 +05:30 */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 +05:30 >}} |
| `{{</* localtime 2026-06-15 09:00 UTC */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-06-15 09:00 UTC >}} |
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="full" */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="full" >}} |
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="%d %B at %H:%M" */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="%d %B at %H:%M" >}} |

## Format presets

| Shortcode | Renders locally as |
|---|---|
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="date" */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="date" >}} |
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="time" */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="time" >}} |
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="time12" */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="time12" >}} |
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="datetime" */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="datetime" >}} |
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="full" */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="full" >}} |

## Custom format strings

| Shortcode | Renders locally as |
|---|---|
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="%H:%M" */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="%H:%M" >}} |
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="%d %B %Y" */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="%d %B %Y" >}} |
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="%I:%M %p" */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="%I:%M %p" >}} |
| `{{</* localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="%A, %d %B %Y at %H:%M %Z" */>}}` | {{< localtime 2026-01-30 13:00 UTC format="%A, %d %B %Y at %H:%M %Z" >}} |

## Supported timezone formats

- Common abbreviations: `UTC`, `GMT`, `EST`, `EDT`, `CST`, `CDT`, `MST`, `MDT`, `PST`, `PDT`, `CET`, `CEST`, `BST`, `JST`, `AEST`, `AEDT`, `NZST`, `NZDT`, and more
- UTC offsets: `+05:30`, `-08:00`, `+0530`, `-8`
- Prefixed offsets: `UTC+5`, `UTC-8`, `GMT+1`
